'''√z-ng-v''' ('''kazangav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deafferent|deafferent]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deafferent|deafferent]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √z-ng-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazangav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thizangav || jizangav || shizangav || kizangav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuzangav || jujuzangav || shushuzangav || kukuzangav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuzangav || juzangav || shuzangav || kuzangav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuzangav || juzangav || shuzangav || kuzangav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thezangav || jezangav || shezangav || kezangav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothozangav || jojozangav || shoshozangav || kokozangav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thozangav || jozangav || shozangav || kozangav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thozangav || jozangav || shozangav || kozangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || zangav || zangav || zangav || zangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || zangav || zangav || zangav || zangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || zangav || zangav || zangav || zangav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || zangav || zangav || zangav || zangav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæzangav || jæzangav || shæzangav || kæzangav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathazangav || jajazangav || shashazangav || kakazangav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thazangav || jazangav || shazangav || kazangav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thazangav || jazangav || shazangav || kazangav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shazangav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshazangav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishazangav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shazangavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshazangavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishazangavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shazangavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshazangavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishazangavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shazangavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshazangavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishazangavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shazangavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshazangavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishazangavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shazangavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshazangavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishazangavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shazangavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshazangavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishazangavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shazangavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshazangavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishazangavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shazangavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshazangavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishazangavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shazangavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshazangavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishazangavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shazangavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazangavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazangavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shazangavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshazangavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazangavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shazangavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshazangavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishazangavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shazangavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazangavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazangavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shazangavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshazangavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazangavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shazangavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshazangavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishazangavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shazangavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshazangavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishazangavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shazangavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshazangavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishazangavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shazangavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshazangavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishazangavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shazangavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshazangavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishazangavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shazangavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshazangavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishazangavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
